common_style: cinematic concept art, dark deep-space backdrop, ultra glossy iridescent surfaces, cyan-to-violet-to-magenta gradient palette (#4cc9f0 #b794f6 #f72585), soft volumetric glow, subtle film grain, high-end editorial visual, no watermark, no logos

images.prompt: A single luminous floating orb made of iridescent liquid glass, suspended in the void. The orb breathes with internal cyan and violet currents, its surface refracting like a soap bubble lit from within. A faint cymatic ripple pattern radiates outward from the orb. Pure black background with a soft radial glow from the upper-left. Cinematic, futuristic, ethereal — visual identity for an AI voice agent named Lucy. No text. No UI.

The same luminous iridescent orb as before, now slightly dimmer and farther away, drifting toward the lower right of the frame. The orb leaves a soft trailing afterglow, like a comet of light. Background fading from deep navy to pure black. Quiet, contemplative mood. No text.

Side-on cinematic shot: a person's silhouette speaking into the air at the left edge of the frame. Glowing cyan voice waveform ribbons travel from their mouth across the scene to the right, where they coalesce into a glassy, dark UI panel floating in mid-air. The panel shows a year slider, a checkbox row, and a glowing search button — all rendered in a dark glass material with cyan and violet accents. The luminous orb hovers behind the panel, bathing it in soft glow. Editorial product-shot lighting. Minimal, premium. No real text labels — fake glyphs are fine.

A stylized 3D isometric infographic of a three-tier system, viewed slightly from above. Three stacked floating slabs of dark glass connected by glowing fiber-optic lines: TOP slab labeled 'Browser' contains a small luminous orb plus three rectangular UI panels; MIDDLE slab labeled 'Bun Proxy' shows pipe icons branching to four lanes; BOTTOM slab labeled 'GCP Cloud Run' shows a single container icon with a globe. Glowing lines pulse with cyan light between the slabs. Pure black void background. High-contrast, premium tech infographic style, like an Apple keynote diagram. Use crisp white sans-serif for the three labels. No other text.

Horizontal swim-lane diagram in dark glass aesthetic, three vertical lanes from left to right. Each lane is a tall translucent glass column with a glowing header. Curved glowing arrows flow between the lanes left-to-right and back, alternating cyan and violet. The headers read 'Lucy', 'A2UI Processor', 'You'. Small glowing pill-shaped event nodes sit on each arrow. Editorial dark UI design, premium tech infographic. Pure black background. Crisp white sans-serif for the three header words only. No other text.
